gameTitle: Star Wars Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast

achievements.title: Kejim Outpost
achievements.description: [Jedi+] Clear Kejim Outpost from start to finish, without returning to the main menu (saving and loading allowed during mission, after quitting, use Level Select from the Extras in the main menu to continue from where you left off)
achievements.author: Mendil

achievements.title: Stormtroopers?!
achievements.description: [Jedi Knight] Clear Bespin Streets without dying or loading a saved game

achievements.title: Stop... Talking!
achievements.description: [Jedi Knight] Reach Tavion in Bespin Platform without dying or loading a saved game

achievements.title: A Small Hope Is Enough
achievements.description: [Jedi Knight] Clear Cairn Bay without dying or loading a saved game

achievements.title: Incoming AT-ST Walker!
achievements.description: [Jedi Knight] Clear Cairn Assembly without dying or loading a saved game

achievements.title: Laser Beams Everywhere!
achievements.description: [Jedi Knight] Clear Cairn Reactor without dying or loading a saved game
achievements.author: Mendil

achievements.title: The Shadow Troopers
achievements.description: [Jedi Knight] Clear Cairn Dock without dying or loading a saved game (must kill all Shadowtroopers & Reborn with Lightsaber attack moves. No Force Speed allowed)
achievements.author: Mendil

achievements.title: This Must Be One Big Ship
achievements.description: [Jedi Knight] Clear Doomgiver's Communications without dying or loading a saved game
achievements.author: Mendil

achievements.title: Took You Long Enough!
achievements.description: [Jedi Knight] Clear Doomgiver's Detention without dying or loading a saved game
achievements.author: Mendil

achievements.title: Your Shields Will Fall
achievements.description: [Jedi Knight] Reach Admiral Galak Fyarr in Doomgiver's Shields without dying or loading a saved game
achievements.author: Mendil

achievements.title: Swamp Troopers.. I Should Have Figured!
achievements.description: [Jedi Knight] Clear Yavin Swamp A and B without dying or loading a saved game (kill a total of 50 enemies including Shadowtroopers with Lightsaber attack moves. Force Speed not allowed)
achievements.author: Mendil

achievements.title: Size Matters Not
achievements.description: [Jedi Knight] Clear Yavin Canyon A and B after killing 24 enemies in A and 10 more in B without using AT-ST or Stationary Guns, Speed, or Shield Recharger, while staying alive (kill all Shadowtroopers with Lightsaber attack moves)
achievements.author: Mendil

achievements.title: Protect the Academy!
achievements.description: [Jedi Knight] Clear Yavin Courtyard after reaching 100% by defeating Reborn and Shadow Troopers while staying in one piece and without hurting or killing any ally (no loading, Force: Speed, Lightning and Grip not allowed)
achievements.author: Mendil

achievements.title: Bacta Collector I
achievements.description: [Jedi+] Have 5 Bacta Containers in Kejim Outpost
achievements.author: Mendil

achievements.title: Bacta Collector II
achievements.description: [Jedi+] Have 5 Bacta Containers in Artus Mine B
achievements.author: Mendil

achievements.title: Bacta Collector III
achievements.description: [Jedi+] Have 5 Bacta Containers in Artus Topside
achievements.author: Mendil

achievements.title: Bacta Collector IV
achievements.description: [Jedi+] Have 5 Bacta Containers in Nar Shaddaa Streets
achievements.author: Mendil

achievements.title: This is My Trusty Gun
achievements.description: [Jedi+] Clear the Kejim chapter using only the Bryar Blaster Pistol in one session (Kejim Base Stationary Gun Turrets not allowed)
achievements.author: Mendil

achievements.title: I Like It When It Goes Pew-Pew-Pew
achievements.description: [Jedi+] Kill 100 enemies with the E-11 Blaster Rifle in one session without dying. Do not use save or load option. No Trip Mines, Thermal Detonator or Detonation Packs, and no Force Lightning or Grip allowed
achievements.author: Mendil

achievements.title: Chewbacca's Favorite
achievements.description: [Jedi+] Kill 50 enemies with the Wookiee Bowcaster in one session without dying. Do not use save or load option. No Trip Mines, Thermal Detonator or Detonation Packs, and no Force Lightning or Grip allowed
achievements.author: Mendil

achievements.title: Remember—No Disintegrations
achievements.description: [Jedi+] Kill 30 enemies with the Tenloss Disruptor Rifle in one session without dying and charging it up to 60%. Do not use save or load option. No Trip Mines, Thermal Detonator or Detonation Packs, and Force Speed, Lightning or Grip allowed
achievements.author: Mendil

achievements.title: Only Imperial Stormtroopers Are So Precise
achievements.description: [Jedi+] Kill 80 enemies with the Imperial Heavy Repeater in one session without dying. Do not use save or load option. No Trip Mines, Thermal Detonator or Detonation Packs, and no Force Lightning or Grip allowed
achievements.author: Mendil

achievements.title: Golan Platform
achievements.description: [Jedi+] Kill 50 enemies with the Golan Arms FC1 in one session without dying. Do not use save or load option. No Trip Mines, Thermal Detonator or Detonation Packs, and no Force Lightning or Grip allowed
achievements.author: Mendil

achievements.title: The Droid Killer
achievements.description: [Jedi+] Kill 15 enemies with the DEMP 2 Gun in one session without dying. Do not use save or load option. No Trip Mines, Thermal Detonator or Detonation Packs, and no Force Lightning or Grip allowed
achievements.author: Mendil

achievements.title: Rocket Jedi
achievements.description: [Jedi+] Kill 10 enemies one at a time with the Portable Missile System in one session without dying. Do not use save or load option. No Trip Mines, Thermal Detonator or Detonation Packs, and no Force Lightning or Grip allowed
achievements.author: Mendil

achievements.title: Zapped!
achievements.description: [Jedi+] Zap 20 enemies in current level with the Stun Baton in one session, without dying or loading a saved game. No Trip Mines, Thermal Detonator or Detonation Packs allowed.
achievements.author: Mendil

achievements.title: Demolition Man
achievements.description: [Jedi+] Get 3 or more kills simultaneously with a Detonation Pack
achievements.author: Mendil

achievements.title: Hey, Catch This!
achievements.description: [Jedi+] Get 4 or more kills simultaneously with a Thermal Detonator
achievements.author: Mendil

achievements.title: Great for Ambushing
achievements.description: [Jedi+] Get 8 or more kills simultaneously with Trip Mines while holding a Trip Mine in your hand
achievements.author: Mendil

achievements.title: This Could Come In Handy!
achievements.description: Acquire the Light Amplification Goggles in Kejim Outpost
achievements.author: Mendil

achievements.title: Spotlights Make Me Uncomfortable
achievements.description: In Artus Mine A, turn off the headlamps and turrets without setting off an alarm
achievements.author: Mendil

achievements.title: Stormtroopers Detected!
achievements.description: Watch the Stormtroopers on the monitor while they're hiding in Artus Mine B
achievements.author: Mendil

achievements.title: Outlawed
achievements.description: Hit an enemy with a fully charged shot from a Tenloss Disruptor Rifle without using Force Speed
achievements.author: Mendil

achievements.title: I'm Just a Guy With a Lightsaber and a Few Questions
achievements.description: [Jedi Knight] Clear Nar Shaddaa Streets using only the Lightsaber and Force Abilities in one session (Loading Save and Level Select allowed)
achievements.author: Mendil

achievements.title: In Equal Measure
achievements.description: [Jedi Knight] Clear Nar Shaddaa Streets using only Guns, Explosives and Force Abilities in one session (Loading Save and Level Select allowed)
achievements.author: Mendil

achievements.title: The Garbage Collector Reelo Baruk
achievements.description: [Jedi Knight] Defeat Reelo Baruk's mobile turrets and all of his goons using only the Lightsaber and without using more than 2 Bacta Containers or loading a saved game (make sure to save before the cutscene so you can retry!)
achievements.author: Mendil

achievements.title: Bespin Pacifist
achievements.description: [Jedi+] Reach the first Reborn in Bespin Undercity B without killing anyone on the way up (Force: Push / Pull not allowed)
achievements.author: Mendil

achievements.title: The Dark Jedi Tavion Axmis
achievements.description: [Jedi Knight] Defeat Tavion without using a Bacta Container (make sure to save before the cutscene so you can retry!)
achievements.author: Mendil

achievements.title: Speed That Kills
achievements.description: [Jedi+] Within one activation of Force Speed and without using any other Force Abilities, defeat 4 enemies consecutively using only Lightsaber swing attacks and deflections
achievements.author: Mendil

achievements.title: Lightning Fast
achievements.description: [Jedi+] Within one activation of Force Speed and without using any other Force Abilities, defeat 6 enemies consecutively using only Lightsaber swing attacks and deflections
achievements.author: Mendil

achievements.title: Sonic the Jedi
achievements.description: [Jedi+] Within one activation of Force Speed and without using any other Force Abilities, defeat 7 enemies consecutively using only Lightsaber swing attacks and deflections
achievements.author: Mendil

achievements.title: Two in One!
achievements.description: [Jedi+] Down two enemies in one Saber Throw
achievements.author: Mendil

achievements.title: Three in One!
achievements.description: [Jedi+] Down three enemies in one Saber Throw
achievements.author: Mendil

achievements.title: Four in One!
achievements.description: [Jedi+] Down four enemies in one Saber Throw
achievements.author: Mendil

achievements.title: Saber Spinner
achievements.description: [Jedi+] Kill 100 enemies with Saber Throws in one session, without dying. Do not use save or load option
achievements.author: Mendil

achievements.title: Acrobatic Jedi
achievements.description: Perform all of the acrobatic moves in one session
achievements.author: Mendil

achievements.title: Jedi Reflexes
achievements.description: Dodge a projectile
achievements.author: Mendil

achievements.title: A Jedi's Strength Flows From the Force
achievements.description: [Jedi+] Overpower an enemy with a Lightsaber after locking blades with them without using Force Abilities
achievements.author: Mendil

achievements.title: Air Strike Attack

achievements.title: Fear is the Path to the Dark Side
achievements.description: [Jedi+] Kill 40 enemies in current level with Force Lightning without dying or loading a saved game.
achievements.author: Mendil

achievements.title: Anger Leads to Hate..
achievements.description: [Jedi+] Kill 20 enemies in current level with Force Grip without dying or loading a saved game (enemies killed while deflecting projectiles do not count).
achievements.author: Mendil

achievements.title: Aww, Sithspit...
achievements.description: Hit Desann with a gunshot
achievements.author: Mendil

achievements.title: Little Friends
achievements.description: [Jedi+] Deploy 3 Seeker Drones and kill 5 enemies without dying or loading a saved game (Bonus Level excluded)
achievements.author: Mendil

achievements.title: Big Friends
achievements.description: [Jedi+] Deploy 3 Portable Assault Sentries and kill 5 enemies without dying or loading a saved game (Bonus Level excluded)
achievements.author: Mendil

achievements.title: Dream Team
achievements.description: [Jedi Knight+] Meet up with Luke and defeat the Stormtroopers and Reborn without being hit
achievements.author: Mendil

achievements.title: May the Gonk Be With You
achievements.description: Have a Gonk Droid recharge your Light Amplification Goggles or Electrobinoculars
achievements.author: Mendil

achievements.title: The Jedi Knight Gallery
achievements.description: Check out the art work in the Extras menu!
achievements.author: Mendil

achievements.title: Mission at Alzoc III
achievements.description: [Jedi+] Clear the bonus level from start to finish, without returning to the main menu
achievements.author: Mendil

achievements.description: [Jedi Knight+] Clear the bonus level from start to finish, without returning to the main menu

achievements.title: The Seeker Drone

achievements.title: Remind Me Never to Do That Again
achievements.description: [Jedi Master] Clear the bonus level without dying or loading a saved game
achievements.author: Mendil

achievements.title: A True Jedi Knight
achievements.description: [Jedi Knight+] Kill 50 enemies and 3 Reborn or Shadowtroopers with the Lightsaber using the Medium Style without dying, using weapons or switching styles in one session (Lightsaber attack moves only counts on the Siths. Force Speed not allowed)
achievements.author: Mendil

achievements.title: A True Jedi Swashbuckler
achievements.description: [Jedi Knight+] Kill 50 enemies and 3 Reborn or Shadowtroopers with the Lightsaber using the Fast Style without dying, using weapons or switching styles in one session (Lightsaber attack moves only counts on the Siths. Force Speed not allowed)
achievements.author: Mendil

achievements.title: A True Jedi Warrior
achievements.description: [Jedi Knight+] Kill 50 enemies and 3 Reborn or Shadowtroopers with the Lightsaber using the Strong Style without dying, using weapons or switching styles in one session (Lightsaber attack moves only counts on the Siths. Force Speed not allowed)
achievements.author: Mendil

achievements.title: Metal Gear Katarn
achievements.description: [Jedi Knight] Clear Cairn Dock without killing more than 18 enemies while staying in one piece (environmental kills with Force Abilities don't count. Must kill all Shadowtroopers & Reborn with Lightsaber attack moves. No Force Speed allowed)
achievements.author: Mendil
